title: Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026

detail.title: Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026
detail.short_info: Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026 is open from 12 April to 22 April 2026. Check DARPAN Important Dates, Eligibility, How to Apply, and register online at darpan.ahseconline.in for Class 11 admission 2026-27.

content.text: Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026 application registration is currently open from 12 April 2026 to 22 April 2026 on the official DARPAN portal. Conducted through the Digital Admission and Registration Portal for Assam New (DARPAN), this is a completely online, merit-based process (no entrance exam) for admission to Class 11 (HS 1st Year) in Arts, Science, and Commerce streams across Assam. Eligible students who have passed HSLC (Class 10) in 2026 can apply online at darpan.ahseconline.in.

This complete guide provides exact dates, eligibility criteria, a step-by-step application process, required documents, and direct official links so you can complete your Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026 without missing the fast-approaching deadline.
Official Notification PDF for Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026: Click Here

links.text: Official Notification PDF for Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026

rows: DARPAN (Digital Admission & Registration Portal for Assam New)

content.text: Apply Online – Direct link to official DARPAN portal.

links.text: Direct link to official DARPAN portal

rows: Last Date to Submit Online Application
Preparation of Merit / Waiting List by Institutions
Publication of Provisional Selection / Waiting List
Acceptance of Admission Offer by Students
Must have passed HSLC (Class 10) examination in 2026 from ASSEB (formerly SEBA) or any other recognized board
Students can apply to maximum 5 institutions only using one mobile number

content.text: Note: Students must contact the respective institution directly for stream-specific eligibility (Arts/Science/Commerce) and subject combination rules.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026

items: Visit the official portal → Apply / Register Here.
Click on “Admission” / “Student Registration” and create your profile using a valid mobile number (same number cannot be used for multiple students).
Fill personal details, academic details (HSLC marks), and choose up to 5 institutions & streams.
Upload recent passport-size photograph and HSLC marksheet (as per specified format).
Preview and submit the application before 22 April 2026.
After submission, track your application status through the Student Corner login.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Assam HS 1st Year Online Admission 2026

items: HSLC (Class 10) marksheet and certificate
Recent passport-size photograph (as per portal specifications)
Valid mobile number (for OTP and future communication)
Caste / Category certificate (if applying under reserved quota)
Other documents as demanded by the chosen institution at the time of admission confirmation
